name: Prysnac Serbia (Broccoli Casserole)
recipeInstructions:
1. Quickly thaw frozen broccoli by placing it in a colander and holding under hot running water. Use a fork to separate the pieces and drain well.
2. Combine the thawed broccoli with all remaining ingredients in a large bowl and beat until well blended.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased crockpot. Cover and cook on High for 1 hour, then switch to Low and cook for an additional 2 to 3 hours.
